definition: Gold answer absent from strict_gate1_cap_k6 final tree under deterministic repair replay.
why_important: Coverage remains the dominant residual failure mode.
improvement_direction: Increase early family diversity and targeted entry to gold-bearing branches.

definition: Gold exists in our tree but final selected answer is wrong.
why_important: Large secondary mode indicates selection/scoring opportunity.
improvement_direction: Tune answer-group ranking and tie-break logic when gold is present.

definition: Observed repeated expansion in the same root family via event-level replay.
why_important: Family concentration often co-occurs with absent-from-tree failures.
improvement_direction: Strengthen anti-collapse gating under cap pressure.

definition: Max family share of expansions >=0.60 in a case.
why_important: Expansion mass concentration reduces breadth and gold-entry probability.
improvement_direction: Raise penalties for dominant-family reuse before F3-like depth.

definition: Longest consecutive same-family expansion run is >=3.
why_important: Long runs indicate local myopia episodes.

definition: One answer group monopolizes support while alternatives exist.
why_important: Group monopoly can suppress late-correct minority branches.
improvement_direction: Require challenger-group verification when monopoly signal fires.

definition: Comparator shows earlier correct entry advantage tag.
why_important: Comparator wins by entering correct basin sooner.
improvement_direction: Bias first successful deepening toward under-explored families.

definition: Comparator reaches correctness with materially fewer actions.
why_important: Budget-use inefficiency leaves less room for corrective exploration.
improvement_direction: Reallocate verification vs expansion under cap_k6.

definition: Comparator has lower family-collapse concentration signal.
why_important: Confirms collapse as practical failure accelerator.
improvement_direction: Increase cross-family compulsory hops after repeated concentration.

why_important: Selection layer still explains a substantial subset.
improvement_direction: Improve chosen-node confidence calibration and extraction consistency.
